description_long: This chaise features a sleek, modern design with a deep blue upholstered seat and backrest, supported by a minimalist black metal frame. The seat is generously padded, offering a comfortable sitting experience, while the backrest is slightly reclined and curves gently to provide ergonomic support. Both sides of the chaise are equipped with integrated armrests that flow seamlessly from the backrest, creating a unified silhouette. The legs are thin, tubular, and form a continuous loop at the base, giving the piece a floating appearance and ensuring stability. The upholstery appears smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or tufting. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern blue upholstered chaise with integrated armrests and a sleek black metal frame, featuring a smooth, solid finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, padded seat, gently sloped backrest, and both armrests, highlighting the inviting and symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the chaise's reclined backrest, thick seat cushion, and the continuous loop of the thin metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backrest's width and curvature, as well as the slim, sturdy metal legs extending downward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the chaise's depth, seat thickness, and the open, airy base formed by the metal frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently reclined, and smoothly curved, providing ergonomic support without any visible segmentation or decorative elements. It is fully upholstered in the same solid blue fabric as the seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated seamlessly into the frame and upholstered in the same material as the seat and backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are thin, tubular, and made of black metal, forming a continuous loop that supports the chaise and gives it a floating, modern appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid blue with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, attached seat cushion and an integrated backrest cushion, both forming a unified, padded surface without any loose or layered cushions.
